docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MING GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT REED EDDIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MING GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REED EDDIE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00, 153 A LOBOS SF CA 94112 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
